---
title: "Hormones"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-24"
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(janitor)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(tidyr)
```

## Gonal FSH
```{r}
freshdata_3$Fsh_iu #Very messy
```
## Clean string
```{r}
freshdata_3 <- freshdata_3 %>%
  mutate(
       Fsh_iu = Fsh_iu %>%
#Remove drug name (case insensitive, flexible spacing), Gonal F
      str_replace_all(regex("Gonal F\\s*=?\\s*", ignore_case = TRUE), "") %>%
      str_replace_all(regex("\\bF\\s*=", ignore_case = TRUE), "") %>%
#Remove "iu"
      str_replace_all(regex("iu", ignore_case = TRUE), "") %>%
#Standardise dash
      str_replace_all("–", "-") %>%
#Standardise D - inconsistent use
      str_replace_all("D(\\d+)-D(\\d+)", "D\\1-\\2") %>%
#Ensure space before parentheses
      str_replace_all("\\(", " (") %>%
#Removes space between bracket and D
      str_replace_all("\\(\\s+", "(") %>%
#Add comma between segments if missing
      str_replace_all("\\)\\s*(?=\\d)", "), ") %>%
#Replace & with comma
      str_replace_all("&", ",") %>%
#Remove double spaces
      str_squish()
  )

#manual typo correction
freshdata_3$Fsh_iu[8] <- "225 (D1-9)"
#manual chronology correction
freshdata_3$Fsh_iu[45] <- "225 (D1-5), 150 (D6-8), 225 (D9-12)"


freshdata_3$Fsh_iu[freshdata_3$Fsh_iu == "n/a"] <- NA
freshdata_3$Fsh_iu[freshdata_3$Fsh_iu == "N/A"] <- NA
sum(is.na(freshdata_3$Fsh_iu)) #11 NA

unique(freshdata_3$Fsh_iu) #28 unique dose entries
```
##PARSING FUNCTION
```{r}
parse_fsh <- function(x) {
  
  #If empty
  if (is.na(x) || x == "" || x == "N/A") {
    return(tibble(
      FSH_used = 0,
      FSH_total_dose = 0,
      FSH_duration = 0,
      FSH_initial_dose = NA,
      FSH_final_dose = NA,
      FSH_max_dose = NA,
      FSH_min_dose = NA,
      FSH_dose_changes = 0,
      FSH_change_day_1 = NA,
      FSH_change_day_2 = NA,
      FSH_change_day_3 = NA,
      FSH_avg_daily = NA
    ))
  }
  
  # Split segments
  segments <- str_split(x, ",")[[1]] %>% str_trim()
  
  dose_data <- tibble()
  last_dose <- NA
  
  for (seg in segments) {
    
    #Extract dose (if present)
    dose_match <- str_extract(seg, "^\\d+\\.?\\d*")
    
    if (is.na(dose_match)) {
      dose <- last_dose
    } else {
      dose <- as.numeric(dose_match)
      last_dose <- dose
    }
    
    #Extract day part
    day_part <- str_extract(seg, "D\\d+(?:-\\d+)?")
    
    if (str_detect(day_part, "-")) {
      start_day <- as.numeric(str_extract(day_part, "\\d+"))
      end_day <- as.numeric(str_extract(day_part, "\\d+$"))
    } else {
      start_day <- as.numeric(str_extract(day_part, "\\d+"))
      end_day <- start_day
    }
    
    days <- seq(start_day, end_day)
    
    dose_data <- bind_rows(
      dose_data,
      tibble(day = days, dose = dose)
    )
  }
  
  #Sort by day
  dose_data <- dose_data %>% arrange(day)
  
  total_dose <- sum(dose_data$dose)
  duration_total <- nrow(dose_data)
  
  #Detect change days
  change_days <- dose_data %>%
    mutate(change = dose != lag(dose)) %>%
    filter(change == TRUE & !is.na(change)) %>%
    pull(day)
  
  tibble(
    FSH_used = 1,
    FSH_total_dose = total_dose,
    FSH_duration = duration_total,
    FSH_initial_dose = first(dose_data$dose),
    FSH_final_dose = last(dose_data$dose),
    FSH_max_dose = max(dose_data$dose),
    FSH_min_dose = min(dose_data$dose),
    FSH_dose_changes = length(change_days),
    FSH_change_day_1 = ifelse(length(change_days) >= 1, change_days[1], NA),
    FSH_change_day_2 = ifelse(length(change_days) >= 2, change_days[2], NA),
    FSH_change_day_3 = ifelse(length(change_days) >= 3, change_days[3], NA),
    FSH_dose_delta = last(dose_data$dose) - first(dose_data$dose),
    FSH_dose_trend = sign(last(dose_data$dose) - first(dose_data$dose)),

    FSH_avg_daily = total_dose / duration_total
)
}
```

## Apply to data
```{r}
freshdata_3 <- freshdata_3 %>%
  mutate(parsed = map(Fsh_iu, parse_fsh)) %>%
  unnest(parsed)
```

## Move columns
```{r}
freshdata_3 <- freshdata_3 %>%
  relocate(starts_with("FSH_"), .after = Fsh_iu)

freshdata_3$Fsh_iu <- NULL
freshdata_3$Total_gonal_f_iu <- NULL
```

##hMG
```{r}
print(unique(freshdata_3[ ,"H_mg"]))

freshdata_3 <- freshdata_3 %>%
  mutate(
    H_mg = H_mg %>%
      #Handle typo
      str_replace_all(regex("Menop\\w*\\s*", ignore_case = TRUE), " ") %>%
      #Remove iu
      str_replace_all(regex("iu", ignore_case = TRUE), "") %>%
      #Standardise dash 
      str_replace_all("–", "-") %>%
      #Remove space after "(") bracket
      str_replace_all("\\(\\s+", "(") %>%
      #Remove space before ")" bracket
      str_replace_all("\\s+\\)", ")") %>% 
      #Inconsistent use of D - remove
      str_replace_all("D(\\d+)-D(\\d+)", "D\\1-\\2") %>%
      str_squish()
  )

freshdata_3$H_mg[freshdata_3$H_mg == "N/A"] <- NA
sum(is.na(freshdata_3$H_mg))
#50 NA
#9 unique dose entries
```

## hMG paraser
```{r}
parse_hmg <- function(x) {
  
  if (is.na(x) || x == "" || x == "N/A") {
    return(tibble(
      Hmg_used = 0,
      Hmg_total_dose = 0,
      Hmg_duration = 0,
      Hmg_initial_dose = NA,
      Hmg_final_dose = NA,
      Hmg_dose_changes = 0,
      Hmg_dose_delta = NA,
      Hmg_dose_trend = NA,
      Hmg_avg_daily = NA
    ))
  }
  
  segments <- str_split(x, ",")[[1]] %>% str_trim()
  
  dose_data <- tibble()
  last_dose <- NA
  
  for (seg in segments) {
    
    dose_match <- str_extract(seg, "^\\d+\\.?\\d*")
    
    if (is.na(dose_match)) {
      dose <- last_dose
    } else {
      dose <- as.numeric(dose_match)
      last_dose <- dose
    }
    
    day_part <- str_extract(seg, "D\\d+(?:-\\d+)?")
    
    if (str_detect(day_part, "-")) {
      start_day <- as.numeric(str_extract(day_part, "\\d+"))
      end_day <- as.numeric(str_extract(day_part, "\\d+$"))
    } else {
      start_day <- as.numeric(str_extract(day_part, "\\d+"))
      end_day <- start_day
    }
    
    days <- seq(start_day, end_day)
    
    dose_data <- bind_rows(
      dose_data,
      tibble(day = days, dose = dose)
    )
  }
  
  dose_data <- dose_data %>% arrange(day)
  
  total_dose <- sum(dose_data$dose)
  duration_total <- nrow(dose_data)
  
  change_days <- dose_data %>%
    mutate(change = dose != lag(dose)) %>%
    filter(change == TRUE & !is.na(change)) %>%
    pull(day)
  
  tibble(
    Hmg_used = 1,
    Hmg_total_dose = total_dose,
    Hmg_duration = duration_total,
    Hmg_initial_dose = first(dose_data$dose),
    Hmg_final_dose = last(dose_data$dose),
    Hmg_dose_changes = length(change_days),
    Hmg_dose_delta = last(dose_data$dose) - first(dose_data$dose),
    Hmg_dose_trend = sign(last(dose_data$dose) - first(dose_data$dose)),
    Hmg_avg_daily = total_dose / duration_total
  )
}
```

## Apply to data
```{r}
freshdata_3 <- freshdata_3 %>%
  mutate(parsed_hmg = map(H_mg, parse_hmg)) %>%
  unnest(parsed_hmg)

freshdata_3 <- freshdata_3 %>%
  relocate(starts_with("Hmg_"), .after = H_mg)

freshdata_3$H_mg <- NULL
freshdata_3$Total_hmg <- NULL
```

#Fyremadel
```{r}
freshdata_3 <- freshdata_3 %>%
  mutate(
    Fyremadel = Fyremadel %>%
      #Remove IU/iu
      str_replace_all(regex("iu", ignore_case = TRUE), "") %>%
      #Standardise dash
      str_replace_all("–", "-") %>%
      #Fix spacing before and after bracket
      str_replace_all("\\(\\s+", "(") %>%
      str_replace_all("\\s+\\)", ")") %>%
      str_replace_all("(?<=\\d)\\(", " (") %>%
      #Standardise D formatting
      str_replace_all("\\s*-\\s*", "-") %>% 
      str_replace_all("D\\s*(\\d+)\\s*-\\s*D\\s*(\\d+)", "D\\1-\\2") %>%
      str_replace_all("D\\s*(\\d+)", "D\\1") %>%
      str_squish()
  )

freshdata_3$Fyremadel[freshdata_3$Fyremadel == "N/A"] <- NA
freshdata_3$Fyremadel[freshdata_3$Fyremadel == ""] <- NA
sum(is.na(freshdata_3$Fyremadel)) #8 NA

freshdata_3$Fyremadel <- NULL

print(unique(freshdata_3[, "Fyremadel"])) #8 unique dose entries
```
## Fyremadel Parser
```{r}
parse_fyr <- function(x) {
  
  if (is.na(x) || x == "" || x == "N/A") {
    return(tibble(
      Fyr_used = 0,
      Fyr_start_day = NA,
      Fyr_end_day = NA,
      Fyr_duration = 0,
      Fyr_total_dose = 0
    ))
  }
  
  dose <- as.numeric(str_extract(x, "^\\d+"))
  
  day_part <- str_extract(x, "D\\d+-\\d+")
  
  start_day <- as.numeric(str_extract(day_part, "\\d+"))
  end_day <- as.numeric(str_extract(day_part, "\\d+$"))
  
  duration <- end_day - start_day + 1
  
  tibble(
    Fyr_used = 1,
    Fyr_start_day = start_day,
    Fyr_end_day = end_day,
    Fyr_duration = duration,
    Fyr_total_dose = dose * duration
  )
}
```

## Apply
```{r}
freshdata_3 <- freshdata_3 %>%
  mutate(parsed_fyr = map(Fyremadel, parse_fyr)) %>%
  unnest(parsed_fyr)

freshdata_3 <- freshdata_3 %>%
  relocate(starts_with("Fyr_"), .after = Fyremadel)

freshdata_3$Fyremadel <- NULL
freshdata_3$Total_fyremadel_iu <- NULL
```

## hCG trigger clean
```{r}
print(unique(freshdata_3$Trigger_h_cg))

freshdata_3 <- freshdata_3 %>%
  mutate(
    #Trim whitespace
    Trigger_h_cg = str_trim(Trigger_h_cg),
    #Convert empty strings or "N" to NA
    Trigger_h_cg = na_if(Trigger_h_cg, ""),
    Trigger_h_cg = na_if(Trigger_h_cg, "N/A"),
    #Remove stray quotes
    Trigger_h_cg = str_replace_all(Trigger_h_cg, '"', ""),
    #Remove IU / iu
    Trigger_h_cg = str_replace_all(Trigger_h_cg, regex("IU|iu"), ""),
    #Fix common typos (very important)
    Trigger_h_cg = str_replace_all(
      Trigger_h_cg,
      regex("Busserillin|Busserelin|Buserellin", ignore_case = TRUE),
      "Buserelin"
    ),
    #Standardise Ovitrelle spelling just in case
    Trigger_h_cg = str_replace_all(
      Trigger_h_cg,
      regex("Ovitrelle", ignore_case = TRUE),
      "Ovitrelle"
    ),
    #Clean spaces up
    Trigger_h_cg = str_squish(Trigger_h_cg)
  )

sum(is.na(freshdata_3$Trigger_h_cg)) ##5 NA
##3 unique, 1 hCG, 1 GnRH agonist, 1 dual
```

## hCG trigger
```{r}
freshdata_3 <- freshdata_3 %>%
  mutate(
    #Extract drugs --> trigger mechanism
    has_hcg = str_detect(Trigger_h_cg, regex("Ovitrelle", ignore_case = TRUE)),
    has_agonist = str_detect(Trigger_h_cg, regex("Buserelin", ignore_case = TRUE)),
    #Extract dose
    hCG_trigger_dose = ifelse(
      has_hcg,
      as.numeric(str_extract(
        str_extract(Trigger_h_cg, "Ovitrelle\\s*\\d+"),
      "\\d+"
      )),
      0
    ),
    GnRH_agonist_trigger_dose = ifelse(
      has_agonist,
      as.numeric(str_extract(
        str_extract(Trigger_h_cg, "Buserelin\\s*\\d+"),
        "\\d+"
      )),
      0
    ),
    #Mechanism
    Trigger_mechanism = case_when(
      has_hcg & has_agonist ~ "Dual",
      has_hcg ~ "hCG",
      has_agonist ~ "GnRH_agonist",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  select(-has_hcg, -has_agonist)

freshdata_3 <- freshdata_3 %>%
  relocate(
    Trigger_mechanism,
    hCG_trigger_dose,
    GnRH_agonist_trigger_dose,
    .after = Trigger_h_cg
  )

freshdata_3$Trigger_h_cg<- NULL
```

## Other Medications
```{r}
print(unique(freshdata_3$Other_medications))
freshdata_3$Other_medications[freshdata_3$Other_medications == "N/A"] <- NA
sum(is.na(freshdata_3$Other_medications)) #69 missing

##remove other medications for now as 

```
